name: Arturo's
teaser: Coal oven pizza is almost always great, and it is here.
review: You know how people act like if something is made in a brick oven then it's gotta be good? Well, coal oven pizza is like that, except it's almost always true â like it is here.
headsUp: A West Village institution. The coal oven has been burning since 1957.
update: One of the few original coal oven spots left. Cherish it.
address: 106 W Houston St, New York, NY 10012, USA
hours: Monday: 5:00 – 11:00 PM · Tuesday: 5:00 – 11:00 PM · Wednesday: 5:00 – 11:00 PM · Thursday: 5:00 – 11:00 PM · Friday: 5:00 – 11:00 PM · Saturday: 5:00 – 11:00 PM · Sunday: 5:00 – 11:00 PM
